summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements for the Luxyle luxury interior décor website. Most frontend components, backend logic, admin dashboard, and styling are present. A few specific acceptance criteria details appear missing or uncertain based on the available diff evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Dashboard protected by username/password login
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboard uses Internet Identity (useInternetIdentity) and isCallerAdmin check for authentication, not a username/password login as specified. The AdminLoginForm is explicitly stubbed out as 'no longer used'. This contradicts the REQ-12 requirement for username/password protection.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields with a submit button
missing_requirements.reason: The ContactPage visible diff shows contact info cards using mailto links rather than a dedicated contact form. The file is truncated so it is unclear if a full contact form exists, but no form submission handler or contact form component is evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats bar on the Home Page showing '500+ Happy Clients', '1000+ Curated Pieces', '10+ Years of Excellence', '100% Premium Quality'
hallucinated_features.reason: No stats bar or statistics section was requested in the build requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Brand Pillars section in About Us showing 'Premium Quality', 'Exclusive Curation', 'Personal Service' in a grid
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies the exact brand story text and a gold divider with split layout. The three brand pillars grid was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Luxyle logo image attempted from /assets/generated/luxyle-logo.dim_400x120.png in the Header
hallucinated_features.reason: Only two generated images were specified in the build request (hero background and about section image). A logo image file was not requested or listed in the images required section.

hallucinated_features.description: Email contact card showing sharanya.242628@gmail.com with a mailto link on the Contact Page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states the email is only for backend admin notifications and that actual email sending is not supported. Displaying the email publicly as a mailto link was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend migration module stripping admin credentials, feedback, and appointment data
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration or data migration requirement was specified in the build request.
